message:
test(mux-pool): Add asupersync-runtime Cx-variant tests for explicit context pool operations

Adds four new tests gated behind #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")] that
exercise the explicit-Cx (context) variants of MuxPool operations to ensure
they behave identically to their implicit-runtime counterparts:

- pool_list_panes_with_cx_reuses_idle_connection: verifies that two
  list_panes_with_cx calls reuse a single pooled connection
- pool_health_check_with_cx_failure: confirms health_check_with_cx correctly
  reports failures when connecting to a nonexistent socket
- pool_multiple_connect_failures_with_cx_increment_counter: validates that
  repeated Cx-path connection failures accurately increment the failure counter
- pool_multiple_health_checks_with_cx_track_counter: ensures five successive
  health checks through the Cx path reuse one connection and track all checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
